title: analysis_bridge record
description: Append the paper-facing analysis bridge (one per analysis pass) that the Writer consumes INSTEAD of raw experiment logs. The rich content (supported/refuted claims, mechanism interpretation, alternatives, limitations, failure modes, claim->evidence map, figure/table + section recommendations, paper-facing result paragraphs) lives in the bridge_ref artifact and is validated by `campaign validate`, which also computes per-claim coverage and sets valid (NOT settable here; force-reset to 0). The analysis->write handoff gate reads valid.

bridge_ref.description: loop-relative path to the typed analysis-bridge.json artifact
